relations.note: Color logic applies within the chart container treatment.
Accent colors emphasize the hero figures the callout hierarchy highlights.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep chart containers consistent and scannable across the system.
rules.rule_text: Charts and infographics are clean, easy to scan and consistent with the system. The container uses uniform rounded corners (chart.container.radius = 12px), a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel and a Brand Blue (#00529b) rounded header bar.

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.**

rules.intent: Reserve accent colors for emphasis so data hierarchy stays clear.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Maintain a friendly, approachable visual language in data graphics.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

quotes: **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart headlines a consistent branded treatment.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines are set in Agenda (print) or Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold (#ffc60a) rule beneath.

quotes: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.

rules.intent: Emphasize the key statistic while keeping supporting copy subordinate.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts set the % figure as the hero — large and bold — with supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Prevent footnotes from competing with primary data.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes are noticeably smaller than and clearly separated from the primary data.
